description: Style NoteThis card holder from hidekraft is a must-have accessory for the style conscious male. Carry your monetary essentials in style with this classic holder.Product DetailsTwo-fold card holder with six card slots and two insert pocketsBranding embossed on the frontMaterial and CareGenuine leatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeDimensions: 11 cm x 7.5 cm
